text: REASONABLE ACCOMMODATION REQUEST — MEDICAL ACCESS Tenant: Lisa English Apartment: 107 Property: Grandview Towers Address: 1000 North Fulton Avenue Date: January 26, 2026 To: Ms. Robin, Property Manager This letter serves as a formal written request for a reasonable accommodation related to a documented medical disability. The tenant, Lisa English, is oxygen-dependent and requires ongoing access by authorized caregivers to medical and respiratory equipment located inside the unit. Due to the current single-key / limited-access lock system, caregivers cannot reliably access the apartment during medical or emergency situations. This creates a health and safety risk and interferes with necessary medical care. Requested Reasonable Accommodation: 1. Issuance of an additional key to an authorized caregiver; or 2. Replacement of the existing lock with a system that supports multiple keys; or 3. Written authorization allowing caregiver-managed lock modification at tenant expense. This request is medically necessary, directly related to the tenant’s disability, and reasonable in scope. Authorized Caregiver: Cody Rice-Velasquez Phone: 317-205-4383 Email: cody@qialy.com
